skill.name: mp-groundline
compatibility: system vince-mp CLI (for the verify step only)

change.summary_zh: 首个可用版本：确定性 Skyline→WebView 迁移扫描器 + MIGRATION-MAP 生成器 + 证据绑定的对照 KB + 触发评测。
change.summary_en: First working version: deterministic Skyline→WebView migration scanner + MIGRATION-MAP generator + an evidence-bound mapping KB + trigger evals.

gate_conditions: deterministic eval harness green (node evals/run_all.mjs → exit 0, 18/18)
16/16 adversarial_checklist edges mapped to a passing case
a clean read-only smoke on a real Skyline program

rollback_trigger: false rewrite on a clean program
rollback.migration_target_rollback: the SKILL's own migration edits a git working tree: revert = git checkout app.json + touched page json

deprecation.note: If WeChat removes the Skyline renderer or vince-mp's CLI contract changes, re-version references/skyline-to-webview.md against the on-disk skyline-* skills and update rules/verify-with-vince-mp.md.
